changes: CRITICAL DOCUMENTATION FIX: Added INSTALL_FIRST_TIME.bat prerequisite to all installation docs
Previous v193.11.6 docs incorrectly said 'pip install flask flask-cors' (only 2 packages)
Corrected to reference INSTALL_FIRST_TIME.bat which installs 35+ packages
Added 3 new comprehensive documentation files
NO CODE CHANGES - All batch files and source code unchanged from v193.11.6
new_files: INSTALLER_ANALYSIS_v193.11.6.txt (15 KB - Analysis of all 9 installer scripts)
changelog.impact: Users following old docs would get ModuleNotFoundError for pandas, numpy, tensorflow, torch, dash, etc. New docs ensure complete installation.
fixed_issues: Installation instructions only installed Flask + Flask-CORS (2 packages)
Missing 33+ critical packages: pandas, numpy, tensorflow, pytorch, transformers, dash, plotly, yfinance, etc.
Would cause complete system failure with ModuleNotFoundError on first run

changes: NEW FEATURE: Web Control Center - Unified web interface for managing all services
Single control panel to start/stop: AU/UK/US pipelines, Dashboard, FinBERT
Real-time terminal output streaming using Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Live trading dashboard embedded in iframe (port 8050)
Process status monitoring (running/stopped, PID display)
Network access support (local WiFi + remote via port forwarding)
Mobile-friendly responsive design
1000-line log buffer per service with auto-scroll
Color-coded log output (green=info, yellow=warning, red=error)
Quick-start script: START_WEB_CONTROL_CENTER.bat
ALSO INCLUDED: Dashboard 'Load Top 50' button fix (Unicode + relaxed filters)
Fixed min_confidence: 60% → 20%, max_age: 48h → 168h for pipeline loader
features: Start/stop all services with one click
Real-time log streaming from all processes

changes: CRITICAL FIX: Removed ALL Unicode characters from logging to prevent Windows cp1252 encoding errors
Replaced 8 Unicode symbols with ASCII equivalents across 20 files (31 total replacements)
Symbols replaced: ✓→[OK], ✗→[X], →→->, ⚠→[!], 🚨→[ALERT], ❌→[ERROR], 🔒→[LOCKED], 📦→[CACHE]
Fixed UnicodeEncodeError in all pipelines: AU, US, UK
Fixed files: spi_monitor.py, lstm_predictor.py, app_finbert_v4_dev.py, finbert_sentiment.py, and 16 others
ALSO INCLUDED: Market Regime Detector false positive fix (US_BROAD_RALLY default → US_RISK_OFF)
Changed fallback regime from US_BROAD_RALLY to US_RISK_OFF (line 360 in market_regime_detector.py)
Added warning log when regime cannot be determined from market data
Conservative approach: when uncertain, default to risk-off rather than risk-on
fixed_issues: UnicodeEncodeError: 'charmap' codec can't encode character '\u2713' (checkmark) on Windows
Logger calls with Unicode emoji/symbols failing on Windows console (cp1252 encoding)
Multiple files had Unicode in logger.info/warning/error calls causing pipeline failures
Market regime defaulted to US_BROAD_RALLY when unable to detect regime (line 360 comment said 'neutral' but code said 'RALLY')
False bullish signals during down markets (S&P -0.6%, VIX 23.8 → BROAD_RALLY with 0.3 strength)
Incorrect sector allocations (Materials, Financials favored when should be cautious)
changelog.testing: Verified with 2026-03-06 09:06 market data: S&P -0.6%, NASDAQ -0.3%, VIX 23.8, Oil +5.6%, AUD/USD -0.4%. Hotfix script processed 20 files successfully.

changes: CRITICAL FIX: AU Pipeline syntax error in spi_monitor.py - Removed duplicate orphaned code
Fixed unterminated triple-quoted string (lines 206-230 had leftover duplicate function body)
Cleaned up get_market_sentiment() - removed 25 lines of dead code from bad merge
All three pipelines now working: AU, US, UK with yfinance redundant call fix applied
Verified fix applies across all markets through unified paper_trading_coordinator.py
fixed_issues: SyntaxError: unterminated triple-quoted string literal at line 797 in spi_monitor.py
AU pipeline failed to start due to syntax error during import
Duplicate/orphaned code from lines 206-230 causing 29 triple quotes (odd number)

changes: HOTFIX: Redundant yfinance API calls causing London market timing failures
Fixed should_allow_trade() to accept pre-fetched price_data parameter
Removed duplicate yfinance call in entry timing evaluation (was causing TypeError during LSE hours)
Removed redundant should_allow_trade() call in position sizing (line 1726)
Performance: 2 fewer API calls per trade evaluation (3mo history x2 eliminated)
All pipelines (UK, US, AU) now use single price_data fetch per symbol
fixed_issues: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable during UK pipeline scan
yfinance download failures for UK symbols during market hours (e.g., HSBA.L, LLOY.L, SHEL.L)
Redundant API calls causing rate-limiting and timing issues

changes: HOTFIX: UK Pipeline initialization error - Fixed undefined _event_monitor() call
Removed leftover test code at module level in world_event_monitor.py line 411
UK overnight pipeline now initializes and runs successfully
World Event Risk Monitor integration working correctly
fixed_issues: NameError: name '_event_monitor' is not defined in world_event_monitor.py
UK pipeline failed to initialize due to module-level function call
Pipeline execution blocked by initialization error

changes: HOTFIX: UnicodeEncodeError on Windows - Added UTF-8 encoding to logging handlers
Fixed logging configuration in unified_trading_dashboard.py
Replaced Unicode arrow (→) with ASCII (->) in log messages
Replaced emoji (🚨) with ASCII ([!]) in alert messages
Console output now works correctly on Windows cp1252 encoding
fixed_issues: UnicodeEncodeError: 'charmap' codec can't encode character '\u2192' (arrow)
UnicodeEncodeError when logging FinBERT scores
Console logging failures on Windows systems

changes: Macro Risk Gatekeeper fully integrated into trading coordinator
Four macro risk gates: World Risk (≥80 blocks), US Market (≤-1.5% blocks), VIX (≥30 requires 70%+ confidence), Financial Sector (stricter)
FinBERT sentiment fallback when neutral (0.000) - uses macro sentiment
Confidence penalty system: LSTM missing (-20%), sentiment missing (-15%), volume missing (-10%)
Fixed March 4, 2026 incident: $556 loss prevented by blocking BP.L, BOQ.AX, NAB.AX during extreme risk
Position multipliers now combine macro risk AND sentiment (e.g., 0.5x macro * 0.75x sentiment = 0.375x)
Applies to ALL markets: AU, US, UK with uniform risk gates
Helper methods: _get_world_risk_score(), _get_us_overnight_performance(), _get_vix()
fixed_issues: Macro gates existed but were not integrated - now active in should_allow_trade()
March 4 trades (BP.L, BOQ.AX, NAB.AX) would be blocked under v193.10
World Risk 100/100 + US -2.5% + VIX 59.3 = All three trades blocked → $0 loss vs $556

changes: CRITICAL FIX: UK stock price updates during after-hours/overnight
Added 4-tier price fallback system (regularMarket → postMarket → preMarket → previousClose → yfinance)
Enhanced fetch_current_price() with detailed logging
Added DEBUG_UK_STOCKS.py diagnostic tool
Added TEST_PRICE_UPDATE_FIX_v191.py test suite
Fixed BP.L and LGEN.L frozen price issue
Improved update_positions() logging for troubleshooting
Fixed dashboard confidence slider default (65% → 48%)
Updated slider range (50%-95% → 45%-95%)
Created comprehensive v190 documentation

critical_fixes.v191.1: UK stock price updates (BP.L, LGEN.L) now work 24/7
